case_title: YUI C. TSANG VS. JU H. LEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
